title: 歌词 / Lyrics
网易云 API 地址 / NetEase API Base
description: 本地网易云 API 地址 / Local NetEase Cloud Music API base URL.

title: 全局歌词偏移 / Lyric Offset
description: 单位毫秒。歌词太晚填正数，太早填负数 / In milliseconds. Positive shows later lyric lines earlier; negative delays them.

title: 听歌识曲 / Audio Match
启用听歌识曲 / Enable Audio Match
description: 开启后用当前谱面音频识别网易云歌曲并优先管理歌词加载；关闭后仅使用标题搜索 / When enabled, current beatmap audio identifies the NetEase song and prioritizes lyric loading; disabled uses title search only.

title: 识曲开始时间 / Match Start
description: 负数时自动取歌曲中点前后各 7.5 秒；非负数时从指定秒数开始取样 / Negative uses a 15s window centered on the song; non-negative starts from this second.

title: 识曲时长 / Match Duration
description: 开始时间为非负数时使用的取样秒数；开始时间为负数时固定使用 15 秒 / Sample length for non-negative Match Start; negative Match Start always uses 15s.

title: 识曲最小偏移 / Audio Match Min Offset
description: 小于此值的识曲偏移会被视为异常并回退标题搜索 / Audio-match offsets below this are rejected and metadata search is used.

title: 识曲最大偏移 / Audio Match Max Offset
description: 大于此值的识曲偏移会被视为异常并回退标题搜索 / Audio-match offsets above this are rejected and metadata search is used.

title: 首句自动偏移 / First-Line Auto Offset
description: 用第一句歌词和第一个物件估算偏移，默认关闭；听歌识曲开启时不会使用它 / Estimate offset from first lyric and first object, disabled by default; ignored when Audio Match is enabled.

title: 自动偏移上限 / Auto Offset Limit
description: 自动估算偏移的最大绝对值，单位毫秒 / Maximum absolute auto offset in milliseconds.

title: 自动提前量 / Auto Offset Lead
description: 歌词普遍滞后时增大它，单位毫秒 / Extra milliseconds added when lyrics feel late.

title: 难度名自动倍速 / Auto Speed From Difficulty
description: 从难度名读取类似的倍速关键词并缩放歌词时间 / Read speed-like keywords from difficulty name and scale lyric timing.

title: 手动倍速 / Manual Speed Multiplier
description: 额外歌词速度倍率 / Extra lyric speed multiplier.

title: 上一行数量 / Previous Lines
description: 当前歌词前显示多少行 / How many previous lyric lines to show.

title: 下一行数量 / Next Lines
description: 当前歌词后显示多少行 / How many next lyric lines to show.

title: 显示翻译 / Show Translation
description: 网易云返回翻译歌词时显示翻译 / Show translated lyrics when available.

title: 搜索候选数 / Search Limit
description: 标题搜索时检查多少个网易云候选 / How many NetEase candidates to inspect.

title: 缓存文件路径 / Song Cache Path
description: 可编辑歌曲 ID 缓存 JSON 路径 / Editable song id cache JSON path.

title: 缓存写入器 / Song Cache Writer
description: 可选本地写入器地址；启动 cache-writer.js 后填 http://127.0.0.1:3001/song-cache / Optional local writer endpoint.

title: 布局 / Layout
面板宽度 / Overlay Width
description: 面板宽度，单位像素 / Panel width in pixels.

title: 歌词高度 / Lyrics Height
description: 歌词区域固定高度，单位像素 / Fixed lyric viewport height in pixels.

title: 主题 / Theme
面板颜色模式 / Panel Color Mode
description: manual 使用手动颜色；beatmap 从背景取色 / manual uses Panel Color; beatmap samples background.

title: 面板颜色 / Panel Color
description: 备用或手动面板颜色 / Fallback or manual panel color.

title: 面板透明度 / Panel Opacity
description: 范围 0 到 1 / Range 0 to 1.

title: 背景混合强度 / Beatmap Color Blend
description: 背景取色后向面板色混合；越高越暗更稳定 / Higher is darker and steadier.

title: 背景强调色 / Accent From Beatmap
description: 用背景取色更新翻译和进度条颜色 / Use sampled background color for accent and progress bar.

title: 网络 / Network
请求超时 / Fetch Timeout
description: 网易云 API 请求超时时间，单位毫秒 / NetEase API timeout in milliseconds.

title: POST 兜底 / POST Fallback
description: GET 遇到 HTTP 404/405 时改用 POST 重试 / Retry with POST when GET returns HTTP 404/405.
